general: Abstract frames parallel reasoning as a set-of-next-token-prediction problem and introduces Set Supervised Fine-Tuning, which matches global forking tokens to diverse reasoning traces to preserve distinct reasoning modes and generate emergent global forking tokens for downstream inference steering.([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/7b9893fba01b9b621abc8d6114afb5cdf3afb9da.pdf))

Sections 2–3 describe learning these global forking tokens via set-based losses and then applying Global Forking Policy Optimization to shape which forked token the model emits, explicitly controlling token selection during inference to encourage diverse yet accurate reasoning paths.([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/7b9893fba01b9b621abc8d6114afb5cdf3afb9da.pdf))
解码策略优化: Global Forking Policy Optimization (GFPO) uses the learned global forking tokens to incentivize complex reasoning by shaping the distribution over those tokens, directly changing token selection during generation to improve Pass@1 and Cons@k benchmarks.([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/7b9893fba01b9b621abc8d6114afb5cdf3afb9da.pdf))
